name: Bug Report or Feature Request
about: Create a detailed report to help us improve the project
title: ''
labels: ''

---

<!--
👋 Welcome! Thank you for taking the time to contribute.

To help address your issue or evaluate your feature request as efficiently as possible, please provide as much specific detail as you can. The more context we have, the easier it is to help!
-->

### 📝 Overview
<!-- Please provide a clear, detailed, and concise description of what the issue is, or what new feature you are requesting. Take your time to explain the "why" and "how". -->


### 🎯 Expected Behavior
<!-- If reporting a bug, what did you expect to happen? If requesting a feature, what is the desired outcome and how should it work? -->


### 🐛 Actual Behavior (If applicable)
<!-- If you are reporting a bug, what is currently happening instead? -->


### 📸 Screenshots or Video Clips
<!-- Visuals are incredibly helpful for UI and behavior issues! If applicable, please drag and drop screenshots, GIFs, or video clips here to demonstrate the issue or the desired feature. -->


### 💻 Environment Context
<!-- Help us understand your setup by providing the details below. -->
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Android]
- **App/Project Version:** [e.g., 1.4.0]
- **Other Details:** [Any other relevant information]


### 🚶‍♂️ Steps to Reproduce (For Bugs)
<!-- Please list the exact, step-by-step actions required to reproduce the behavior. -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error
